'''lomavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:reactogenic|reactogenic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-m-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reactogenic|reactogenic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lomavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lomavithi|lomavithi]] || [[word:lomaviji|lomaviji]] || [[word:lomavishi|lomavishi]] || [[word:lomaviki|lomaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lomavuthuthu|lomavuthuthu]] || [[word:lomavujuju|lomavujuju]] || [[word:lomavushushu|lomavushushu]] || [[word:lomavukuku|lomavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lomavuthu|lomavuthu]] || [[word:lomavuju|lomavuju]] || [[word:lomavushu|lomavushu]] || [[word:lomavuku|lomavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lomavufthuf|lomavufthuf]] || [[word:lomavufjuf|lomavufjuf]] || [[word:lomavufshuf|lomavufshuf]] || [[word:lomavufkuf|lomavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lomavethe|lomavethe]] || [[word:lomaveje|lomaveje]] || [[word:lomaveshe|lomaveshe]] || [[word:lomaveke|lomaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lomavothotho|lomavothotho]] || [[word:lomavojojo|lomavojojo]] || [[word:lomavoshosho|lomavoshosho]] || [[word:lomavokoko|lomavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lomavotho|lomavotho]] || [[word:lomavojo|lomavojo]] || [[word:lomavosho|lomavosho]] || [[word:lomavoko|lomavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lomavofthof|lomavofthof]] || [[word:lomavofjof|lomavofjof]] || [[word:lomavofshof|lomavofshof]] || [[word:lomavofkof|lomavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lomavĂŻfthĂŻf|lomavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lomavĂŻfjĂŻf|lomavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lomavĂŻfshĂŻf|lomavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lomavĂŻfkĂŻf|lomavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lomavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|lomavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lomavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|lomavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lomavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|lomavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lomavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|lomavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lomavĂŻfthĂŻf|lomavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lomavĂŻfjĂŻf|lomavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lomavĂŻfshĂŻf|lomavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lomavĂŻfkĂŻf|lomavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lomavĂŻfthĂŻf|lomavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:lomavĂŻfjĂŻf|lomavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:lomavĂŻfshĂŻf|lomavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:lomavĂŻfkĂŻf|lomavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lomavĂŠthĂŠ|lomavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:lomavĂŠjĂŠ|lomavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:lomavĂŠshĂŠ|lomavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:lomavĂŠkĂŠ|lomavĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lomavathatha|lomavathatha]] || [[word:lomavajaja|lomavajaja]] || [[word:lomavashasha|lomavashasha]] || [[word:lomavakaka|lomavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lomavatha|lomavatha]] || [[word:lomavaja|lomavaja]] || [[word:lomavasha|lomavasha]] || [[word:lomavaka|lomavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lomavafthaf|lomavafthaf]] || [[word:lomavafjaf|lomavafjaf]] || [[word:lomavafshaf|lomavafshaf]] || [[word:lomavafkaf|lomavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lomavasha|lomavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lomavshĂ«sha|lomavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lomavrosha|lomavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lomavmusha|lomavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lomavyasha|lomavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golomavnkshĂ«sha|golomavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golomavnkrosha|golomavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golomavnkmusha|golomavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golomavnkyasha|golomavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lomamavasha|lomamavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lomamavshĂ«sha|lomamavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lomamavrosha|lomamavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lomamavmusha|lomamavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lomamavyasha|lomamavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golomamavnkshĂ«sha|golomamavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golomamavnkrosha|golomamavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golomamavnkmusha|golomamavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golomamavnkyasha|golomamavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lemĂŠvasha|lemĂŠvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lemĂŠvshĂ«sha|lemĂŠvshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lemĂŠvrosha|lemĂŠvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lemĂŠvmusha|lemĂŠvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lemĂŠvyasha|lemĂŠvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golemĂŠvnkshĂ«sha|golemĂŠvnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golemĂŠvnkrosha|golemĂŠvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golemĂŠvnkmusha|golemĂŠvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golemĂŠvnkyasha|golemĂŠvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lomfavasha|lomfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lomfavshĂ«sha|lomfavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lomfavrosha|lomfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lomfavmusha|lomfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lomfavyasha|lomfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golomfavnkshĂ«sha|golomfavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golomfavnkrosha|golomfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golomfavnkmusha|golomfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golomfavnkyasha|golomfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
